creator: junker@moderato.snu.ac.kr
text:
New ports request:

kr-netscape-3.01intl
	FreeBSD hack of Netscape International Edition, v3.01.
	It hacks OSF/1 2.0 version of Netscape-Intl setup and
	BSD's Netscape 3.01.

How-To-Repeat: 
Get ports from:
 ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/kr-netscape3.ports.tar.gz
